TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Samuluh, title = Samuluh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Samuluh} }

S.FORM: Samuluh Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Samuluh a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 255 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 243 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 12 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun86%, Amis2%, Paiwan2%, Puyuma2%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: samo~u~u…ĺo~u~uńß itiniaj i ńßai…¨~…ģo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u samo~u~u…ĺo~u~uńß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Samuluh Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Samuluh a niyaro', 56 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 255 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 243 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 12 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun86%, Amis2%, Paiwan2%, Puyuma2%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: samo~u~u…ĺo~u~uńß itiniaj i ńßai…¨~…ģo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u samo~u~u…ĺo~u~uńß a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
